pi_items.source: setup_task.sh explicitly downloads and writes the NOAA NCEP reanalysis dataset to this path.
Execution of python script parsing the netcdf dataset confirmed 'air' is the variable name for the long term mean monthly air temperatures.
setup_task.sh configuration explicitly creates and requires this output directory.
Script requirements in setup_task.sh set this coordinate (North America). Python analysis of the raw NetCDF data confirms it is a land mass with a July peak of ~22.77 °C.
Script requirements in setup_task.sh set this coordinate (North Pacific Ocean). Python analysis of the raw NetCDF data confirms it is an ocean mass with an August peak of ~15.50 °C.
setup_task.sh cleans these specific paths and verifier.py strictly checks for their presence and metadata.

privileged_info_summary: The task utilizes a real-world meteorological dataset (NCEP/NCAR Reanalysis Surface Air Temperature) downloaded from NOAA. Analysis of the NetCDF file 'air.mon.ltm.nc' confirms the variable is 'air'. The land coordinate (45N, 260E) in North America experiences a peak average temperature of 22.77 °C in July, while the ocean coordinate (45N, 190E) in the North Pacific Ocean experiences a delayed peak average temperature of 15.50 °C in August due to thermal inertia/heat capacity. The expected output directory and required output files are confirmed by both setup and verifier scripts.
